name: Coloc_abf_test
description: Bayesian colocalization (coloc.abf, Giambartolomei 2014) of two GWAS/QTL signals over the same SNP set in a region. Tests whether the two traits share a single causal variant. Returns the five posterior probabilities PP0-PP4; PP4 (>0.8 = strong) is the probability of a shared causal variant - the standard way to link a GWAS locus to a gene via an eQTL. Pure-compute (no R, no LD matrix); pairs with eQTL_get_associations + GWAS summary tools.

beta1.description: Trait 1 per-SNP effect sizes over the region (same SNP order as trait 2).

beta2.description: Trait 2 per-SNP effect sizes (same SNP order/alleles).

snp.description: Optional SNP identifiers (same order) to label the best shared variant.

sd_prior.description: Prior SD of the effect size (default 0.15; 0.2 common for case/control log-OR).

p1.description: Prior prob a SNP is causal for trait 1 (default 1e-4).

p2.description: Prior prob a SNP is causal for trait 2 (default 1e-4).

p12.description: Prior prob a SNP is causal for both traits (default 1e-5).
